zh.Griffe, Nuneaton, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾努聶亞頓
zh.St Mary Cray, Kent, England: 英國肯特聖 瑪麗 可雷
zh.Saffron Walden, Essex, England: 英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybell Juliana de Dorset於大約1341年出生在英國瓦維其可爾努聶亞頓時，她的父親John Darset41歲，母親Elizabeth Phelipp33歲。她於大約1372年與Robert Belknap結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1414年7月22日在英國巴金哈姆爾享年74歲。

zh-hans.Griffe, Nuneaton, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾努聶亞頓
zh-hans.St Mary Cray, Kent, England: 英国肯特聖 瑪麗 可雷

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybell Juliana de Dorset于大约1341年出生在英国瓦維其可爾努聶亞頓时，她的父亲John Darset41岁，母亲Elizabeth Phelipp33岁。她于大约1372年与Robert Belknap结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1414年7月22日在英国巴金哈姆爾享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dorset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dorsett
meanings: English: habitational name from the county of Dorset, named from Old English Dorn, an early name of Dorchester (of British origin, from durn ‘fist’, probably referring to fist-sized pebbles) + sǣte ‘dwellers’.

nameMeanings.name: Sybell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Sabel
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybell Juliana de Dorset was born about 1341, in Nuneaton, Warwickshire, England, her father, John Darset, was 41 and her mother, Elizabeth Phelipp, was 33. She married Robert Belknap about 1372. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 22 July 1414, in Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybell Juliana de Dorset est née environ 1341, à Nuneaton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, John Darset, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Phelipp, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Belknap environ 1372. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 juillet 1414, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybell Juliana de Dorset um 1341 in Nuneaton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Darset 41 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Phelipp 33. Sie hat um 1372 Robert Belknap geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Juli 1414 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybell Juliana de Dorset è nata il circa 1341 nel Nuneaton, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, John Darset, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Phelipp, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Robert Belknap circa 1372. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 luglio 1414, nel Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイア

ja.lifeSummary: Sybell Juliana de Dorsetが約1341年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアヌネアトンで生まれた時，父John Darsetは41歳，母Elizabeth Phelippは33歳であった。約1372年にRobert Belknapと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1414年7月22日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybell Juliana de Dorset(이)가 대략 1341년 영국 워윅실르 누니앳에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Darset(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Phelipp(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1372년 Robert Belknap(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1414년 7월 22일 영국 벅잉함실르에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybell Juliana de Dorset nasceu aproximadamente 1341, em Nuneaton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Darset, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Phelipp, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Belknap aproximadamente 1372. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de julho de 1414, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybell Juliana de Dorset родилась около 1341 г. в местности нунитон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Darset было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Phelipp, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Belknap около 1372 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 июля 1414 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybell Juliana de Dorset nació aproximadamente 1341, en Nuneaton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Darset, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Phelipp, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Robert Belknap aproximadamente 1372. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de julio de 1414, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años.
